prompt: A dreamlike vertical Chinese ink-and-wash fantasy illustration of a woman's side-profile silhouette merged with a vast shanshui landscape, with the facial area obscured by a plain soft-edged rectangular block in warm taupe beige. Her long flowing dark hair turns into swirling brushstroke ribbons, mountain ridges, mist, and clouds, filling the upper left with elegant motion. Inside the silhouette, create a layered classical Chinese landscape with towering blue-green mountains, drifting fog, cascading waterfalls, 4 traditional pagodas nestled among cliffs, 1 arched stone bridge crossing a narrow river, 1 tiny boat with a lone figure beneath the bridge, and stylized pine trees scattered across the peaks. Add 5 white cranes in flight across the upper half of the image and several small drifting petals. Place pink cherry blossom branches in 4 distinct clusters: one woven into the upper-left hair mass, one blooming near the bridge, one large cluster rising from the lower left, and one sparse flowering branch near the upper right. Use a warm sunrise glow from the upper right with a pale golden sun disk, luminous mist, parchment-textured negative space, and a refined palette of teal, indigo, ivory, blush pink, and soft gold. The composition should feel ethereal, poetic, elegant, and highly detailed, blending feminine portrait silhouette art with ancient Chinese landscape painting. Add vertical calligraphy on the lower right reading 山水如梦 with 2 red seal stamps beneath it. Ultra-detailed, painterly, airy atmosphere, delicate linework, watercolor and ink textures, cinematic depth, premium wall-art aesthetic.
